forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+color: e36209
+description: Replace the single-pass `review` skill and the slow hook-based AVP validator system with an on-demand, local, multi-agent review tool. A Rust orchestrator in swissarmyhammer-tools scopes a git diff, matches rules-as-data (reusing the AVP rule loader, decoupled from hooks), fans out one specialized review agent per dimension in parallel (configurable ACP backend, default session agent / forceable local Llama), runs an adversarial verification pass to drop false positives, then synthesizes deduped severity-ranked findings into the existing kanban GFM-checklist contract. The AVP hook execution is retired entirely — all rules (including safety) run only via on-demand review. Modeled on Claude ultra-review's fleet+verify architecture, fully local, no cloud sandbox.
+name: Local Multi-Agent Review
reverse_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,3 +0,0 @@
-color: e36209
-description: Replace the single-pass `review` skill and the slow hook-based AVP validator system with an on-demand, local, multi-agent review tool. The AVP hook execution is retired entirely — all rules (including safety) run only via on-demand review. Modeled on Claude ultra-review's fleet+verify architecture, fully local, no cloud sandbox.
